activities.comment: And so it begins again. An inglorious start just 1.50 miles. Hope to improve on mileage as the days progress.
Walked a mile with Eddie before and after spending most of the day at the Heartland 50mile/50K/25K races. Walked 2.25 additional on the course at Teterville rd aid station.
Warming up today, 87° kind of a blahs day, didn't do much of anything today.¯\_(ツ)_/¯
Walked just 0.53 miles out side. Then retreated to the treadmill due to rain and lightning ⚡️⛈️ 6.30 miles on the treadmill in 2:16
Walked 2.75 miles with Eddie. Then got out of the rain and on the treadmill and did 4.25 miles
Walked 2.5 miles with Eddie🐕 and 3.75 miles to Central and Maize loop. A cool 53° tonight.
